title: Investigation Commitment
summary: Ada formally enters pursuit mode by preserving evidence, marking windows, and beginning controlled private inquiry.

narrative.newInfo: The story transitions from event response to investigation engine.
narrative.dripHook: The next phase is no longer waiting for weirdness; it is actively hunting pattern.
narrative.payoffDelivered: Decision reward: chapter ends with explicit pursuit posture.
narrative.notes: End on disciplined intention, not explanatory certainty.

rewardTokens.description: Ada creates a private anomaly workflow and commits to continued inquiry.
Evidence handling and note discipline establish procedural integrity.
